mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_MEMBERS ( PLANT, GUBUN, EMPID, NAME, EMAIL, DEPTCD, JIKGUB, PASS, SECURE_GRADE, USEAREA, PARTNERSHOWYN, TEL, MOBILE, PASSYN, PASSWRITERID, SHOWYN, LOGINYN, SESSIONTIME, OUTERACCESSYN, CHIEFYN, PASSWD, PLANTAREA, FROMTODAY, PARTNERGUBUN, MANAGERYN ) VALUES ( #{PLANT}, #{GUBUN}, #{EMPID}, #{NAME}, #{EMAIL}, #{DEPTCD}, #{JIKGUB}, #{PASS}, #{SECURE_GRADE}, #{USEAREA}, #{PARTNERSHOWYN}, #{TEL}, #{MOBILE}, #{PASSYN}, #{PASSWRITERID}, #{SHOWYN}, #{LOGINYN}, #{SESSIONTIME}, #{OUTERACCESSYN}, #{CHIEFYN}, #{PASSWD}, #{PLANTAREA}, #{FROMTODAY}, #{PARTNERGUBUN}, #{MANAGERYN} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COM_MEMBERS SET PLANT = #{PLANT}, GUBUN = #{GUBUN}, NAME = #{NAME}, EMAIL = #{EMAIL}, DEPTCD = #{DEPTCD}, JIKGUB = #{JIKGUB}, PASS = #{PASS}, TEL = #{TEL}, MOBILE = #{MOBILE}, SHOWYN = #{SHOWYN} WHERE EMPID = #{EMPID}
